stories.title: LeBron James — Cavaliers Emerge as Front-Runner, Decision Still Not Imminent

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The latest on LeBron James:

Cleveland is emerging as the FRONT-RUNNER.

Rich Paul: no decision "anytime soon."

Warriors offer $15M. Cavs offer veteran minimum (~$3.9M).

LeBron might go home for almost nothing. 👑 #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Brian Windhorst: LeBron James has refused to hold formal meetings with teams.

He's keeping everyone in the dark.

Rivals are starting to read the silence differently — Cleveland is the lean.

The wait continues. 👑 #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: LeBron James Free Agency: Cleveland Emerging as the Front-Runner Despite Massive Pay Cut

stories.title: Darryn Peterson Explodes for Back-to-Back 25/12 in Summer League

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Darryn Peterson just posted back-to-back 25-point, 12-assist games at Salt Lake City Summer League.

No. 2 pick. Utah Jazz. 19 years old.

Yahoo Sports: "It may be just Summer League, but Darryn Peterson looks special."

The Jazz might have something. 🏀 #NBATwitter

article.headline: Darryn Peterson's Back-to-Back 25/12 Performances Are Turning Summer League Into Must-Watch TV

stories.title: Ja Morant Officially a Trail Blazer — Fresh Start in Portland

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ja Morant to the Portland Trail Blazers is officially DONE.

The price: Jerami Grant + Kris Murray + cash.

Zero draft picks. Portland just landed an All-Star PG for nothing.

Fresh start season. 🌹 #TrailBlazers #NBATwitter

stories.title: Kawhi Leonard Hires New Agent, Eyes Raptors Extension

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kawhi Leonard just hired a new agent — specifically to negotiate a Raptors extension.

He's eligible for 2 years/$123.7M.

Message received, Toronto. 🦖 #Raptors #NBATwitter
